    void
    GTNetExchangeLog.aggregate(GTNetExchangeLog other)
    Aggregates another log entry into this one by summing the counters.

    GTNetExchangeLogJpaRepository
    Repository for managing GTNet exchange log entries.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<GTNetExchangeLog>
    GTNetExchangeLogJpaRepository.findByIdGtNetAndEntityKindAndRole(Integer idGtNet, byte entityKind, boolean logAsSupplier)
    Finds all log entries for a specific GTNet, entity kind, and role.
    List<GTNetExchangeLog>
    GTNetExchangeLogJpaRepository.findByIdGtNetAndEntityKindOrderByTimestampDesc(Integer idGtNet, byte entityKind)
    Finds all log entries for a specific GTNet domain and entity kind, ordered by timestamp descending.
    List<GTNetExchangeLog>
    GTNetExchangeLogJpaRepository.findByIdGtNetOrderByTimestampDesc(Integer idGtNet)
    Finds all log entries for a specific GTNet domain, ordered by timestamp descending.
    List<GTNetExchangeLog>
    GTNetExchangeLogJpaRepository.findByPeriodTypeAndPeriodStartBefore(byte periodType, LocalDate beforeDate)
    Finds log entries by period type that started before a specific date.
